message:
Add dry run output and expand main functionality

New features:
- output/dry_run.rs: Dry run output handling

Major updates:
- main.rs: Significantly expanded application logic
- snapshot/db.rs: Database snapshot improvements
- snapshot/schema.rs: Schema refinements
- config/path.rs: Path configuration updates

Test improvements:
- batch_operations.rs: Batch operation tests
- common/ utilities: assertions, capture, cli, env, fixtures, logging
- generate_fixtures.rs updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,2 +1,4 @@
 # bv (beads viewer) local config and caches

+target-crimson/
